name: SINCOR2 Yield Optimizer
description: DeFi yield vertical: SharedLiquidityVault drawdown sizing for high-EV Polyclaw positions and lending loops on Base. Every proposal passes an Auditor validation gate.

skills.name: Yield Opportunity Evaluation
skills.description: Scores a Polymarket edge or lending-loop spread against a vault lane's availableDraw; returns EV net of funding cost.
examples: Evaluate a 12% edge market against strategy lane 0.
Is this lane worth a drawdown?

skills.name: Auditor-Gated Drawdown Proposal
skills.description: Produces paste-ready drawDown calldata sized within availableDraw, only after Auditor approval.
examples: Propose a drawdown for this high-EV position.

skills.name: settleUp Callback Processing
skills.description: Encodes settleUp calldata, updates win-rate calibration, and feeds the observer/improver loop.
examples: Settle position with principal 2960 and fee 266.

skills.name: Lending Loop Scanner
skills.description: Ranks lending-loop spreads across vault lanes, Auditor-filtered, by expected value.
examples: Scan all lanes for loop spreads above 2.5%.
